tejaj-misakkah-lezzet.name: Tejaj Misakkah
instructions: 1. Special tejaj musakkah recipe from Lebanese cuisine: roast the juices from fine shore and pink in olive oil.
2. Add the chickens to the onions and continue roasting.
3. Add the peppers to the thin coastal mixture.
4. Add and blend salt, pepper and sum.
5. Share the mixture into the bread of the bread and wrap it in the form of a bite.
6. Cut on the neck of three cm in the grill.
7. Place the service plate.
8. Celebrate cherry tomatoes in sunflower.
9. Serve fried cherry tomatoes with fresh onion and fresh coughing.

tex-mex-pantry-casserole.name: Tex-mex Pantry Casserole
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat. Cook and stir ground beef until browned and crumbly, about 6 minutes. Drain off any grease.

Add butter and onion to the skillet. Saute until onion is softened and fragrant, about 5 minutes. Sprinkle in taco seasoning and pour in tomato sauce. Stir to combine. Add broth, corn, black beans, Spanish rice mix, and salsa; mix well.
Spray a casserole dish with nonstick cooking spray. Pour the beef mixture into the casserole dish. Top with Cheddar cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven until cheese is melted and filling is bubbling, about 20 minutes.

thai-red-curry-chicken-argiro.name: Thai Red Curry Chicken
instructions: Add half the coconut cream and curry paste into a deep pan and allow the mixture to boil over medium heat stirring until completely homogenized.

When the cream thickens and the oil is collected on the surface, add the chicken (in bites) as well as the rest of the coconut cream and boil for 25 minutes until the chicken softens and the cream thickens.
Add the corn and boil for 5 more minutes.
Add the fish sauce, sugar, ginger and lime juice. Try and correct the taste with lime or fish sauce.
Place jasmine rice in a bowl and turn it over to the center of the dish.
Serve around the chicken and the tied red sauce.
Sprinkle with basil leaves and accompany with four limes.

thanksgiving-skillet-pizza-with-turkey-m.name: Thanksgiving Skillet Pizza With Turkey, Mashed Potatoes, And Cranberry Sauce

ingredients.item: Shredded cooked turkey or rotisserie chicken

ingredients.prep: cheddar, and/or Fontina cheese (about 6 ounces), divided
such as green beans, Brussels sprouts, sautéed greens, carrots, squash

instructions: Place a rack in upper third of oven; preheat to 260°C. On a lightly floured surface, roll dough to a 12" round (if dough springs back, cover with plastic and let rest 5 minutes, then roll again, resting as needed).

Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a cast-iron skillet over medium-high until very hot. Carefully transfer dough to skillet. Brush top of dough with remaining 1 Tbsp. oil. Cook, shaking pan occasionally and turning pan to avoid hot spots, until bottom of dough is golden brown and crispy, 3–4 minutes.
Meanwhile, toss turkey with 1/4 cup cranberry sauce, if using, in a medium bowl.

Remove skillet from heat. Using a large flat spatula, flip dough. Spread potatoes over dough, leaving a 3/4" border on all sides; season with salt and pepper. Top with 1 cup cheese, then turkey mixture, vegetables, and onion. Top with remaining 1 cup cheese and red pepper flakes, if using. Bake pizza until dough is golden brown and cheese is melted, 6–8 minutes.
Transfer pizza to a cutting board and cut into wedges. Serve with additional cranberry sauce alongside, if using.

the-ba-burger-deluxe.name: The Ba Burger Deluxe
instructions: Divide the ground beef into 4 equal portions (approximately 6 oz. each).
Place one portion on a work surface. Cup your hands around the meat and gently shape it into a rounded mound, using light pressure to avoid packing the meat too tightly.
Lightly press down on the top of the meat with your palm to gently flatten it.
Continue rotating and cupping the meat, patting the top occasionally, until a 4-inch diameter, 3/4-inch thick patty is formed.
Using your thumb, make a small indentation in the center of the patty to help keep it flat as it cooks.
Transfer the formed patty to a plate.
Repeat steps 2-6 with the remaining portions of meat.
Build a medium-hot fire in a charcoal grill, or preheat a gas grill to high heat.
Season one side of the patties with kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper.
Place the seasoned patties on the grill, seasoned side down.
Grill for about 4 minutes, or until lightly charred on the bottom.
Season the other side of the patties, then turn them over. Immediately top each patty with a slice of American cheese.
Continue grilling for about 4 minutes longer for medium doneness, or to your desired level of doneness.
Transfer the cooked burgers to potato rolls.
Let the burgers stand for 3 minutes before serving.

the-girl-of-argyros-argiro.name: The Girl Of Argyros

ingredients.item: Cephalotiri grated or dried myzithra grated
Cephalotiri grated or dried myzithra grated

instructions: Recommended piece of beef for the yuvetsi is the olive, with bone or without, a piece that has enough fat and is ideal for yuvetsi. Alternatively, if you want less fat meat, use a heart spatter.
Tap the beef on absorbent paper to dry.
In a deep pot, heat the olive oil and turn around the meat portions about 3-4 minutes on each side.
Add the whole vegetables, onion, carrot, leek, garlic and let them oil.
Add the paste and rub it on the base of the pot for 1 minute.
Add the wine and allow it to evaporate in half of its volume.
Add the chopped or chewed tomatoes and 11⁄2 to 2 litres of water.
Add the bay and the grained spice.
Tie the parsley stems with a string and add them to the sauce.
Cover and simmer until it softens for about 2 hours.
To the end of the boil, add salt and pepper.
In a pot, heat the olive oil and add the barley, stirring to oil well.
We empty it into a deep pan. From above, add the boiled red beef.

Remove the vegetables (onion, carrot and leek) from the sauce and pour the ingredients into the baking pan. The sauce must cover the barley. If it has evaporated during boiling, add boiling water until 3 cm above the barley is covered.

the-ischler-cookie.name: The Ischler Cookie
instructions: Grate almonds using nut grater.
In the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with flat beater, beat almonds, powdered sugar, and butter until fluffy. Scrape down sides of bowl. Add egg and vanilla; beat until blended.
Whisk together flour and salt. On low speed, gradually add flour mixture to butter mixture. Mix until incorporated and dough begins to come away from sides of bowl.
Scrape mixture into a plastic bag and press it together. Remove dough from bag and transfer to a large sheet of plastic wrap. Use the edges of the wrap to knead dough until smooth.
Divide dough into quarters. Wrap with plastic and flatten into disks. Place in freezer bag. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours and up to 2 days.

In a medium saucepan with a tight-fitting lid, soak dried apricots in 2 cups water for 2 hours. Bring to a boil, cover, and simmer for 20-30 minutes on the lowest heat until apricots are very soft. If water evaporates, add a little extra.
In a food processor, pulse apricots and liquid with sugar, lemon zest, and brandy.
Return mixture to saucepan and simmer, stirring, 10-15 minutes, until deep orange and thick.
Transfer to a bowl; let cool. (You will need only about 2/3 cup, but the leftover will keep almost indefinitely when refrigerated.)
Preheat oven to 350°.

Set 1 dough disk on a lightly floured surface. Lightly flour dough and re-cover it with plastic wrap. Let dough soften until malleable, about 10 minutes. Roll 1/8" thick, adding more flour if necessary to keep dough from sticking.

Cut out 20 cookies. Place 1/2" apart on a parchment-lined baking sheet. (Set aside scraps; cover with plastic wrap.) Bake cookies 4 minutes. Rotate the cookie sheet then continue baking for 2-6 minutes, or until edges brown.
Let cookies cool on a wire rack.
Repeat process with remaining dough disks. (After the last batch is cut, you can knead together all the scraps and repeat chilling, rerolling, and cutting.)
Heat chocolate in a bowl set over hot water (not touching), stirring with a silicone spatula, until almost completely melted. Remove from heat and stir until fully melted.
Add cream; stir until smooth. (The mixture should drop thickly from the spatula. If the ganache thickens before it's used, reheat in the microwave in 3-second bursts.) Set aside.

Spread bottoms of half of the cookies with a thin layer of apricot filling. Spread bottoms of the remaining cookies with a slightly thicker ganache layer. Set the chocolate cookies, coated side down, on the apricot cookies. Let sit for a minimum of 30 minutes.
Store airtight at room temperature, 5 days; frozen, 6 months.

tiger-salad.name: Tiger Salad
instructions: Whisk vinegar, oil, sesame seeds, and red pepper flakes in a large bowl. Add cilantro, celery, cucumbers, and scallions. Season with salt and pepper and toss to combine.
DO AHEAD: Salad can be made 6 hours ahead. Cover and chill.

tiramoussa-semifreddo-frozen-italian-cof.name: Tiramoussa Semifreddo – Frozen Italian Coffee Dessert
instructions: Combine egg yolks, instant dark roast coffee, marsala wine, and sugar in a metal bowl and whisk together until smooth.

Place bowl in the top of a double boiler over lightly simmering water. Whisk constantly until mixture thickens and drippings from the whisk form ribbons on the surface that are visible for 1/2 second to 1 second, about 10 minutes. If you are 'brave', you can set the bowl directly over medium-low heat and thicken the egg cream that way, but you have to be careful so you don't end up with scrambled eggs. This last method is slightly faster and will take about 6 to 7 minutes.
Beat egg whites in a glass, metal, or ceramic bowl until foamy. Gradually add salt and continue to beat until stiff peaks form. Set aside.
Beat heavy cream in a chilled glass or metal bowl with an electric mixer until medium-stiff peaks form.
Using a spatula, fold in egg yolk mixture until combined.
Add half of the egg whites and fold in until combined. Then fold in remaining egg whites until well combined.
Transfer mixture into small 4 ounce jam jars and close with lids. Freeze for 4 hours or overnight.
Garnish and enjoy!

toddler-muffins.name: Toddler Muffins
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Grease a 24-cup mini muffin tin or a 12-cup standard muffin tin.

Beat butter and brown sugar together in a mixing bowl until smooth. Stir in bananas, baby food, carrots, and eggs. Stir in flour, oat bran, baking soda, pumpkin pie spice, and salt until just combined. Spoon batter equally into the prepared muffin cups.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into centers comes out clean, 15 to 20 minutes. Cool in the tins for 10 minutes before removing to a wire rack to cool completely. Store at room temperature for up to 2 days, or freeze.

tomas-collins.name: Tomas Collins
instructions: Pour simple syrup, aquavit, fresh lime juice, and dill pickle brine, in order listed, into an 11-oz. highball glass filled with ice cubes. Top with seltzer.

tomato-and-cheddar-pie.name: Tomato And Cheddar Pie
instructions: Whisk first 4 ingredients in a medium bowl. Using your fingertips, rub in butter until coarse meal forms and some small lumps remain. Stir in buttermilk and knead gently with your hands until dough forms. Wrap dough in plastic and chill for 1 hour.
Lay tomatoes in a single layer on a baking sheet lined with 2 layers of paper towels. Place another 2 layers of paper towels on top of tomatoes. Let stand for 30 minutes to drain.
Preheat oven to 425°. Roll out dough between 2 sheets of plastic wrap to an 11" round. Remove top layer of plastic wrap. Invert dough onto pie dish. Carefully peel off plastic wrap.
Toss both cheeses in a medium bowl until evenly incorporated. Reserve 1/4 cup of cheese mixture. Whisk scallion, mayonnaise, dill, vinegar, sugar, salt, and pepper in a small bowl.

Sprinkle cornmeal evenly over bottom of crust, then top with 1/2 cup cheese mixture. Arrange 1/3 of tomatoes over cheese, overlapping as needed. Spread half of mayonnaise mixture (about 1/3 cup) over. Repeat layering with 1 cup of cheese mixture, 1/2 of remaining tomato slices, and remaining mayonnaise mixture. Sprinkle remaining 1 cup cheese mixture over, then remaining tomato slices. Sprinkle with reserved 1/4 cup cheese mixture. Fold overhanging crust up and over edges of tomato slices.

Bake pie until crust is golden and cheese is golden brown, 35-40 minutes (check crust halfway and tent with foil if it's getting too dark). Let pie cool at least 1 hour and up to 3 hours before slicing and serving.
Editor's note: This recipe reflects the change made to the amount of buttermilk in the crust.

tomato-and-cheese-tart-lezzet.name: Tomato And Cheese Tart
instructions: 1. For Tart pulp, melt butter and cool.
2. Take a large kneading container and add yogurt, eggs, salt and baking powder to the car.
3. blend the mixture thoroughly.
4. Then the soft and swabbywe knead by adding the avant until you get a hook.

9. Heat the oven to 190 degrees.
10. Peeling for inner mortar and fine shore.

tomato-salad-with-feta-cheese-lezzet.name: Tomato Salad With Feta Cheese
instructions: 1. Wash and chop tomatoes.
2. Cut white cheese in the form of cube.
3. After peeling the shell of the red onion, swipe.
4. Wash dryness.

10. Take the salad in the serving plate and serve as a result of a wide range of blue peppers.

tomato-soup-recipe-with-basil-comedera.name: Tomato Soup Recipe With Basil
tomato-soup-recipe-with-basil-comedera.original_name: Receta de sopa de jitomate con albahaca
instructions: Lava muy bien los tomates y ponlos en una olla con agua. Hierve por unos 10 minutos hasta que se ablanden.
Retira de la olla y deja reposar.
Peel the onion and cut into julians or notebooks. Warm a pot with a tablespoon of butter. Once melted, skip onion for 2 minutes, add basil and cook for another minute.
Incorpora los tomates y saltea por 2 minutos.
Agrega todos los ingredientes salteados a una licuadora y procesa hasta que se forme una salsa cremosa.
Calienta la misma olla con la otra cucharada de mantequilla y una vez se derrita, vierte la sopa de tomate.
Sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto. Mezcla muy bien y cocina por 5 minutos.
Turn off and serve and you'll be ready to taste.

tomato-stramboli-lezzet.name: Tomato Stramboli
instructions: 1. Leave onions for 2 minutes in fine chopped olive oil.
2. Peel the shells of tomatoes and add them to the onion in the form of cube.
3. Bake for 10 minutes on the ground fire.
4. Salt, pepper, pepper and let the cake add and cool.
5. Open the bread dough in the rectangle form on the counter, which is unified with the help of the roller.
6. Release on tomato sauce.
7. Directory on Jambon slices.
8. Spread the grated cheese.
9. Wrap the leaves of the fetus in the form of directories and rolls.
10. Transfer the roll into oiled paper series oven tray.
11. 11. Remove the egg yolk on it and cook until the oven is fried over 190 degrees in advance.
12. Serve hot by slice of. from the oven.

traditional-catalan-cream-recipe-comeder.name: Traditional Catalan Cream Recipe
instructions: To start with, we'll separate the yolks from the clear from the eggs. Since for this recipe we will only need the yolks, we can keep the clear ones in a bowl in the refrigerator to prepare another recipe (and consume them quickly).

We'll also leave another ingredient ready to use: lemon. With a manual pellet, remove the skin into tapes, or as complete as you can. The rest of the lemon will be intact for another production (but while keeping it in the refrigerator).
Then, in a bowl, we will mix egg yolks with sugar and get a well integrated dough.
On the other hand, in a saucepan, we will warm up the milk and add the lemon shell with the cinnamon branch. At the time of pouring milk, we'll have to put some place in a cup.
Dejaremos que la leche se caliente hasta hervir, con el fuego a temperatura media, para asegurarnos de que no se queme o se pegue a la superficie de la olla.

At the same time, we will have to use them to dilute the maize starch into the other milk we had been saving at the plate. We'll mix up this way to make sure that the maicena doesn't make clumps in the liquid. Once this step has been achieved, we will add it to the rest of the milk.
After the milk has been boiled, we will remove it from the fire and remove the skin from the lemon and cinnamon branch.
We will immediately mix with the dough we had prepared earlier with egg and sugar.

After all ingredients are well integrated, get them back into the fire and cook them at low temperature, till they get creamy consistency. To achieve this, you will have to constantly remove them with a wooden scatula, and that will make the mixture become thick, little by little.

When you get the desired creamy consistency, remove the mixture from the fire. Retract them into individual containers you wish to use to serve. If you have traditional mud pits, so much better. Another option is to use a single large mold.
Let your dessert cool at room temperature, before passing them to the refrigerator. Then put him cold for a few hours and put him under care.

When you get to serve the Catalan cream, cover every bowl with a good sugar cape and quickly pass the fire of a blow, so that the sugar will burn or caramelish. That will give you the characteristic golden color of the surface of this dessert.

traditional-french-toast-teleculinaria.name: Traditional French Toast

ingredients.item: 8 slices (with 2 cm thick) bread cum or bread form with 3 days

instructions: Light half the milk with cinnamon stick, lemon peel and sugar and let it boil for 10 minutes in medium heat. Then add the remaining milk and discard the cinnamon stick and the lemon peels.
Pass the bread slices through the previous milk and then through the milked eggs. Fry them in hot oil on both sides until they're golden. Drain, sprinkle with cinnamon and reserve.
Leve ao lume um tacho com todos os ingredientes indicados para a calda e deixe ferver durante 3 minutos. Regue as rabanadas com esta calda, deixe arrefecer e sirva.

traditional-peruvian-seafood-rice-comede.name: Traditional Peruvian Seafood Rice

ingredients.item: 2 tazas de caldo de camarones (para el arroz)
½ more cup of shrimp stock (for the rest of the recipe)
200 gr de camarones frescos con piel
1 handful of sea shells: clams (mussels, scallops)

instructions: First of all: cook the white rice in a pot with the 2 cups of shrimp stock, the bay leaves and 1 teaspoon of salt. When the liquid evaporate, put down the fire and cover. He'll be ready in 20 minutes. Reserve.
Lava y limpia todos los mariscos y conchas.
To shrimp remove skin and head and use them to make stock.
Pica los calamares y el pulpo en ruedas.
Cooking octopus with water for 20- 30 minutes. When you're ready, get ready.
Limpia bien las conchas de mar.
He pics all the plants into small notebooks. In the case of Peru's aji, you can ground it after withdrawing its seeds and veins.
That first step I recommend to do 2 hours before the rest of the production to allow the grain to cool a little.
Sigamos con el resto de la receta del arroz con mariscos:
Warm up a pot or a paeler. Add a few tablespoons of olive oil and pour the garlic teeth, onion, tomato and aji (in that order). Add oregano, salt and pepper and a small chorrit of white kitchen wine.
Cuando el vino se evapore, agrega la media taza restante del caldo de camarones.
Incorpora las conchas, luego los calamares frescos y el pulpo previamente cocido, revuelve unos minutos.
At this moment you can put his ham with his back if you have decided to use it (it's spicy), his eyebrows and his pitted shrimp.
Revisa la sal y pimienta de este guiso.
Agrega el arroz cocido y revuelve bien todo.
When the shrimp are cooked they serve your rice with seafood with fresh cilantro leaves chopped up. You can also put some frosted egg wheels just as in the photo.

traditional-red-bean-soup-teleculinaria.name: Traditional Red Bean Soup
instructions: Cut the cabbage into julian (cuts); peel and cut the pumpkin into pieces, as well as onion, potato and turnip; peel the carrot and cut it into half-moons; wash the leek and cut it into half-moons. Book some beans, cabbage, carrots and garlic for the garrison.

Light a pot with the olive oil, the onion and the leek. When the saute is translucent, add the water and salt. When you lift a boil, add the beans, the cabbage, the carrot, the turnip, the potato and the pumpkin. Let it cook well and then crush until you get a cream.
Add the vegetables you reserved for the garrison, stir and let it cook a little more. Retrieve the seasonings and remove from the fire. Serve the soup next, very hot.

tray-lahmacun-lezzet.name: Tray Lahmacun
instructions: 1. Take onions, garlic tomatoes and peppers for the mortar from the rondodan and a kneading container.
2. Add meats and shakes to this mixture and taste them with spices.
3. Adding water, knead all materials until they miss.
4. Place the ruby dough into the oily paper-series oven tray.
5. Open holes on the help of fork for bulking.
6. Share the chopped tribute on the tomato dough.
7. Preheated 200 degree cook in oven for 20 minutes.
8. Decorate the above with a large chopped parsley and warm service.

tuna-cannelloni-and-healthy-recipe-peque.name: Tuna Cannelloni ( And Healthy Recipe)
tuna-cannelloni-and-healthy-recipe-peque.original_name: Canelones de Atún (receta fácil y saludable)
instructions: We cook 6 plates of cinelons (for 6 cinelons) with some salt and a tablespoon of olive oil. To remove from time to time so they don't stick with each other. When they're cooked, we get them and we get them and we get them out and we put them plates in a clean and dry cloth.

While we prepare the pilling by minting the tuna (we will have been slightly drained) with tomato, minced eggs, roasted peppers and olives, also minced. Then we complete the plates with the padded and put them into a canelon and put them into an oven glass source.

To make a delicious bechamel and stop them from growing up, it's very important that we get our milk hot and we put it up and down and about and about. First we will heat butter with medium heat and once melted we add the flour and cook a few minutes stirring continuously. That's how we'll stop beesamel from knowing raw flour. At that time we began to get some milk that we have been warming up earlier. It's important that before we continue to add milk we move well with some rods until completely mixed. Once we get the thickness we want we pat and we can get rid of if we like a pňta of nutmeg.
We put the bechamel into the canelones and distribute them well and cover them up. Then we put some grated cheese at best and put them in the oven till they get greased.

tuna-nicoise-salad.name: Tuna Niçoise Salad

ingredients.item: Fresh lemon juice or white wine vinegar
. diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. plus  0.125 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: trimmed, and/or baby gold or red potatoes, halved if large
capers, peperoncini, pickles, anchovy fillets, or other pickled-briny ingredients, drained well (for serving)

instructions: Whisk ¾ cup extra-virgin olive oil, ¼ cup fresh lemon juice or white wine vinegar, 2 Tbsp. Dijon mustard, 1 tsp. honey, 1 tsp. freshly ground black pepper, and 1 tsp. kosher salt in a medium bowl; set niçoise salad dressing aside.

Bring a medium pot of salted water to a boil over high heat. Add 1 lb. green beans, trimmed and/or baby potatoes, halved if larger to boiling water and cook until fork tender, 2–4 minutes for green beans, 10–15 minutes for potatoes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer to bowl of ice water; let sit until cold, about 3 minutes. Transfer to paper towels; pat dry.

To serve, slice 6 Jammy Soft-Boiled Eggs, chilled, in half and arrange on a large platter with green beans and/or potatoes, 4 cups seedless cucumbers, thinly sliced on a diagonal, and 3 cups oil-packed tuna. Top with olives, capers, peperoncini, pickles, anchovy fillets, or other pickled-briny things, drained well, sprinkle with flaky sea salt, and drizzle some reserved dressing over. Serve with remaining dressing alongside.
Do Ahead: Dressing can be made 5 days ahead; cover and refrigerate.

Editor’s note: This niçoise salad recipe was first printed in our August 2019 issue. Head this way for more of our favorite summer salads →

tuna-salad-with-peas-recipe-step-by-step.name: Tuna Salad With Peas Recipe Step By Step
tuna-salad-with-peas-recipe-step-by-step.original_name: Receta de ensalada de atún con guisantes paso a paso
instructions: Open the tuna can and scrape it well.
Also open the cans of peas and corn and put the grains into a paddle and wash them with some fresh water. Let them run a few minutes.
Meanwhile pits half onion into very small cubes.
Peel and cut carrot into cubes with an approximate size of a corn bean.
Now that you have all the ingredients cut and drained, simply put them into a bowl or a salad.
Add a touch of salt to your taste and a lemon jet.
Mezcla y mete en la nevera unos minutos antes de comerla.
That's been easy, isn't it?

turkey-breast-in-the-air-fryer-the-recip.name: Turkey Breast In The Air Fryer, The Recipe To Make It Juicy
turkey-breast-in-the-air-fryer-the-recip.original_name: Pechuga de pavo en freidora de aire, la receta para que quede jugosa

ingredients.item: 4 filetes de pechuga de pavo (unos 400 g)
2 cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra
Sal al gusto (ojo con la soja)

instructions: In a bowl we mix 2 tablespoons of olive oil, 1 tablespoon of soya sauce and 1 tablespoon of mustard till well integrated. We add 1 teaspoon of pimi, 1 teaspoon of garlic powder, 1 teaspoon of onion powder, ½ teaspoon of cumin, ½ teaspoon of oregano and ½ teaspoon of black pepper. We mix everything up and form some kind of liquid dough.

Incorporamos los 4 filetes de pavo y los impregnamos bien por todos lados con el adobo. Dejamos reposar al menos 30 minutos en la nevera para que cojan sabor (si tienes prisa, puedes saltarte este paso, pero se nota).

We have been pressurizing airfryer at 180 and 3 for 3 minutes. We place the steaks without pounding them and cook at 180 ″ 3 ″ for 6 -8 minutes and turn them midway. From minute 5-6 we watch: as soon as they are golden and made from within, we get them out.
We check that they are built inside and let them rest a few minutes before serving.

turkey-spaghetti-zoodles.name: Turkey Spaghetti Zoodles
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add turkey breast, green pepper, garlic, Italian seasoning, ground black pepper, salt, and red pepper flakes; cook and stir until turkey is lightly browned, 4 to 5 minutes.
Stir marinara sauce and baby spinach into the turkey mixture; cook and stir until marinara sauce is warm through, about 3 minutes.
Stir zucchini noodles into the sauce with tongs; cook and stir until the zucchini is slightly tender, 2 to 3 minutes.

turkey-torta.name: Turkey Torta
instructions: Soak onion in vinegar 1 hour, then drain.
Mix lime juice into some sour cream.
Build a sandwich with Kaiser roll, lime sour cream, turkey, avocado, lettuce, hot sauce, cilantro, cheese, and pickled onion.

turkey-spinach-meatballs.name: Turkey-spinach Meatballs

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: thawed, squeezed in paper towels to remove excess moisture

instructions: Heat oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Cook onion, stirring often, until soft but not brown, about 5 minutes. Add garlic, oregano, and red pepper flakes; season with salt and pepper and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add tomato paste and 1 Tbsp. water and cook, stirring, until tomato paste coats onion and begins to darken, about 3 minutes.
Add tomatoes to saucepan, crushing with your hands as you add them. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and gently simmer until slightly thickened, 20–25 minutes; season with salt and pepper.
Preheat broiler. Cover a rimmed baking sheet with foil and coat with nonstick spray.

Using your hands or a fork, gently mix egg, onion, garlic, turkey, spinach, Parmesan, breadcrumbs, parsley, fennel seeds, lemon zest, and salt in a large bowl just until combined. Scoop out turkey mixture by the ¼-cupful and form into balls (you should have about 20). Place on prepared baking sheet, spacing 2” apart; brush with oil.

Broil meatballs, turning often, until browned all over and cooked through, 15–18 minutes. Add to marinara sauce.
Do Ahead: Meatballs with marinara sauce can be made 2 weeks ahead. Let cool completely and freeze individual portions in resealable plastic bags. Run under tepid water to loosen from bag and gently reheat, covered, until meatballs are warmed through and sauce is bubbling, 15–20 minutes.
